articles.title: New Zealand vs Bangladesh T20 2026: Under-strength Kiwis Lead
articles.what_this_means: New Zealand's under-strength squad (many stars at IPL 2025) has taken a 1-0 lead over Bangladesh's returning T20I side, showcasing how replacement players and bench strength can still compete at international level. For Indian diaspora fans in the US balancing multiple cricket formats, this series offers compelling viewing between India cricket score updates.

articles.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi: IPL 2025 Rising Star, India Cricket Future
articles.what_this_means: Experts say fast-tracking Vaibhav Sooryavanshi to India cricket would be a mistake. Instead, the Brian Lara strategy—letting him develop through domestic cricket alongside established internationals—offers the best long-term path to international success without derailing promising talent.

articles.title: Rahul's Record 152 in IPL 2025: 'I Had to Catch Up' to T20 Demands
articles.what_this_means: KL Rahul just rewrote IPL 2025 history with a stunning 152 against Punjab Kings, proving he's mastered modern T20 aggression. His message? In T20 cricket, there's no time to wait — you attack immediately or fall behind. This has major implications for India cricket's upcoming international campaigns.

articles.title: Dug Dug Trailer: Ritwik Pareek's Faith Mystery on Streaming 2025
articles.what_this_means: Dug Dug, a debut film by Ritwik Pareek about a wish-granting bike, explores faith and mystery through a comedy-satire lens. Backed by Anurag Kashyap and acclaimed filmmakers, it's shaping up as one of 2025's must-watch Indian films. Coming soon to Netflix, Prime Video, or Hotstar.

articles.title: AI Ethics in Tech: What the Specsavers Case Means for Your Career [2026]
articles.what_this_means: A high-profile legal case over misused personal imagery highlights growing liability risks for tech companies deploying AI without ethical safeguards. For Indian engineers, this means auditing AI systems for consent, data privacy, and compliance is now career-critical—and a path to higher salaries and senior roles in 2026.
